2026-06-23.text: Great experience. One thing that I do think would be a small yet effective addition would be something like folders where you can store your different chats into. For example, if you have several different chats of the same category under one character, it would make it much easier to organize everything with folders, and they wouldn't be jumbled up with other types of chats.

2026-06-21.text: discovered yesterday. the memory is impressive & the amount of ads isn't as bad as other apps. what breaks immersion for me is that when you type something and it's responding, if it makes a mistake, i can't stop it mid sentence. I spend more time correcting it's mistakes than what should be necessary. it just keeps going on and on, sometimes for about 20 seconds straight and the mood is ruined by then. overall, this has major potential and needs a few tweaks.

An actually good alternative to any other AI roleplaying app that's out there, probably the best. There's a bunch of little editing nooks and crannies that help out a bunch if you're making your own AI, and the end results are so so SO good. I can say that there are forced ad breaks every so often, but for how good this is, and how long the chats are? Worth it.

As a PolyBuzz refugee, I was ready to call it vastly superior. But after a while, you hit an ad block that makes the app pretty much unusable and the paid subscription doesn't offer enough for me to justify paying $15 - $20 a month. I might have been more inclined if the other chat models were included in the subscription and not only available via in-app currency.

It's extremely detailed, but very quickly devolves into fragmented, incomplete sentences that break immersion and are difficult to read. It happens every time, and can't really be fixed. It's a real shame, because it's otherwise incredible. Fix this, and allow us to decide the length of responses, and this would be perfect.

2026-04-12.text: Was 5 stars but I've noticed ads are becoming more frequent. I've counted messages sent between ads before and now they're about twice as common. edit: it's frustrating when the longer you go, the sentences go from proper full sentences to sentence fragments. Alongside that, it's lagging and being down for maintenance or having issues super often which sucks since I'm now paying. edit: bringing to 3 stars with how often it's having issues or being down lately

2026-03-11.text: I believe the app is very amazing! The ads aren't as frequent, I could say there literally are none! 2026-04-15.text: the app is okay. sometimes I feel the ads are excessive. the ai also breaks often. repeating the same thing or typing messages so long that the text stops working. and they keep going. also as of currently I keep trying to send a message but it won't let me. it says there was a error sending. i uninstalled the app then reinstalled it to see if it was a me thing. but it still isn't working.

2026-05-29.text: I thought this would be another pay-per-message app. It lets you chat for free. Yes, you have to take a break and watch an ad occasionally, but that's not bad! Yes, there are paid upgrades. . . But that's how app creators find further refinement and development. I just wish the monthly subscription wasn't so expensive. A different app I use only charges $15 per month for access to their next tier bots.

2026-06-12.text: I say this as someone coming from casual use of Ch.ai and character AI. Zeta is a mountain of better. The ads aren't ridiculously long, but they ARE frequent. But, for an ad that mostly will last a max of 10-15 seconds, it is not that bad. I do wish we could change the color of the chat bubbles and background, just because it's a bit of a bright color, to me. I also wish that there were options for chat speeds (unless there is and I didn't notice). But, overall a great app. My go to, right now.

2026-06-11.text: Just started using the app, I'm pleased with it. Only issue? To the staff and team at zeta? Please add in Voices, for the characters you can choose to talk to. It would be a lot more better, for uses to be able to choose a voice for their chat, and listen instead of just reading and typing out conversations. Other than that? Not a bad app, find it better than Character.ai.

2026-06-14.text: seems to be unlimited and even though the free version is supposed to have less memory, it's got enough memory that the AI keeps up, though it can forget from one sentence to the next, like my college roommate took his hoodie off and it fell onto the floor, then it was tossed over his monitor, then he was wearing it again as if he had never taken it off. But you can buy into unlimited as well, and that's what I like. there are also other AI models, premium models, to choose from.

2026-06-10.text: It's really fun. Love this app. Unlimited chats and editing make great stories. And this has it. Too bad you can't get photos here by watching ads or or without watching ads. Just wish you didn't have to pay for it. Needs better memory. But unfortunately, you gotta pay for that, too. If you want to have something for people to buy. Have them pay for gifts. And to get rid of ads too. Ads should be optional

2026-06-16.text: does a great job, but limited. I was trying to run a dungeon core experience, but the ai forgetting key details the next day was frustrating. main characters would change name or race, design. previous choices about rooms were forgotten. it's hard to recommend if you only get a few hours of "game play" before the cracks start to show and kills the immersion. The story telling was good and receptive.

2026-06-04.text: I like that I can preview everything (even chat intro) before it opens a chat in my library. The bots are very good at writing, even though their responses are VERY long. You can send feedback to the bot to shorten them. The ads aren't as bad as I expected. I haven't used it enough to talk about memory or errors, though. I'll come back when I do.

2026-06-17.text: The ads are way too pushy. I can only type about 1-3 messages before I have to wait 30 seconds for a forced break because they want you to buy their premium membership. As someone who types long messages pretty fast, this is devastatingly annoying. Everything else about this app is great, but the frequency of ads make it completely unenjoyable and practically unusable. I know you need to get your bag, but this is too much. Please change the frequency of ads to be less overbearing.

2026-06-06.text: I've spent $100s on this app not even gonna lie. I like it a lot. but it needs more memory. it does its best but even paying 4 credits per reply the AI can't keep up for long. I didn't notice a big difference when I tried 8 and honestly it's too expensive to justify. increase the memory and just add monthly premium payments to access it. make it more durable and more affordable and it's a hard 5.

2026-06-18.text: very good but I have a few complaints 1. the ads, OMG it's literally almost every other message. 2. the response time: the AI is great, I love it. it gives details that you normally wouldn't expect an AI to give but the response speed is not fast. it's definitely not slow but because the response length is so long, it feels slow. 3. it starts to be less intelligent the longer the chat goes on. 4. sometimes it answers for you. otherwise great app. (BTW no filters)

2026-06-03.text: Amazing app!! great AI. the premium version pricing seems a LITTLE much, but I think it's nice you can buy a day pass! and the advertisements are perfect. not too much, reasonable for a free version! I like being able to watch ads without any message limit. but sometimes it will say the app has stopped working but it'll be completely fine. and some advertisements crash the app completely which is weird. but overall this is my personal favorite AI story app!!!

2026-06-13.text: A little hallucinations, but I take it in stride and swing it back, using the AI hallucinations as bombs being dropped in canon. Haven't been charged. Not beat to death with ads... I like the progression. Custom RPG story. I gave it 9 bullet points/words to build a story, such as reluctant hero, heroes journey, intrigue, low magic, and I'm having a freaking ball.. Fantastic. For the first hour I was concerned my character was going to be killed. Awesome. I felt agency, but not dues-ex-machina.

2026-04-13.text: After so long I've basically had enough. The ads have made it virtually unusable. It might be because I took off my phone case, which would still be dumb, but the X on ads just takes me to the app store, and when I come back from the app store, the chat I clicked on is gone, which is just great if I found a good chat I saw and didn't remember the name, since it doesn't save the chat if you click on it and get sent to the app store. 2026-02-27.text: Y'know, it was fine for ads to pop up before chats. Nothing too bad, right? Well, now they're everywhere! No matter where you go, theres an ad. I get that things gotta have ads for money and such, but the old way they were shown in the app was better than how frequent we get them now.

2026-03-07.text: Editing my initial rating since the new update. I think the ads are too much. Before the new update, I thought the ads were tame enough to handle. 2026-02-26.text: This was my favorite app for role-playing with my favorite characters, I used to be borderline addicted to it. The subscription cost isn't really worth the "benefits" either but it's like you're going to bombard us with ads until we cave.

2026-03-17.text: Pretty disappointed. Been using this app consistently for the past 6-ish months and now I just keep getting bombarded by ads. 2025-07-09.text: I'm getting more disappointed with every update that goes by. - Constant errors. 2024-09-06.text: Enjoyable conversations, & the ability to create your own stories with such a varying number of characters for almost every genre. Highly recommend! The only thing I would change is how often the characters displayed are refreshed. I feel like I often see many of the same one's.

And that's such a shame because some of the regenerations are only three dots or chats that don't make sense. And NO, I don't want to watch another ad, because sometimes when I do that, the extra page that I watched a 1 minute ad for is full of nonsense. PLEASE GIVE US THAT EXTRA PAGE BACK. Other than that, the app is still really fun. BUT PLEASE.

2026-02-26.text: Pretty decent, not the best but decent, but the 500 character limit is pretty annoying when I got so much I'd like to write, so being forced to shorten my imaginative creativity takes away the fun in the interactions. 2026-03-17.text: I think I've started using this app a lot more since the addition of Their Phone. It's very nice! Especially when it does it with my Talkies. I love seeing the images! I wish I could post pictures on Google Play so I could show you my favorites. Thank you so much for adding this feature! 💛💛

2026-01-30.text: I like the app, it isnt like the other AI apps when it gives ads way too frequently and it isnt sudden either. Also I sometimes on accident go back where I see all my other recent chats with AI's, and its kinda annoying for me so I think it would be better if there was a confirm button so you know if you are actually trying to get off the AI chat or if it was just on accident.

Love the app but all of a sudden I'm going onto one of my fav talkies and I only get 2 regenerations even though I had also gotten an +1 because of my level. So I went onto a random talkie and clicked to reset the text and it only gave me one page while you guys added 3 extra. Instead of 5 at max level, you only get four. 2026-02-13.text: For a while this app earned the 5 stars I originally gave it. 2 years in, though, and the app is quite different. 2025-12-31.text: it's a great app, don't get me wrong, it's been nothing but a great experience, but the characters always act a bit.. weird, I can't explain it but they don't act like how the canon character should act, I'm not sure if I'm just doing something wrong, or if people are just writing them incorrectly. also, please increase the message limit, I wanna be able to say/send more detailed stuff in chat.

2026-04-13.text: I've had this app for almost a year and I'm glad to see them changing the interface of it. it needed to be change. but the issue I'm having is each AI i talk to takes at least 30 minutes just to give me a response back. sometimes it doesn't even work. other then that this app is great to use. the Ads are spaced evenly if you don't have the subscription. if they change the speed of the response I'll change my star rate from a 3 to a 5.

2026-01-03.text: It was great until they added ad. I get ads are good for revenue, but not when they pop up almost every time I switch characters. 2025-05-17.text: I've looked into a few apps like this, and this is without a doubt one of the best I've found. I'll be having a conversation, and it will forget something I told it just a few message bubbles ago. good job team!

2025-10-11.text: This is definitely my favorite of the apps. I do pay for Ultra membership so I get the most conversation style options and no ads. 2025-08-20.text: It's fun, but the better storytelling models cost money. either you subscribe and get a couple of extra free models, or you pay for the currency. 2026-05-17.text: In the top 2 of all these ai apps. Free play is fun and not limited. Thanks, I will be subbing when money isn't so tight or you give that monthly discount.

2026-06-01.text: Pretty fun, though unfortunately has a lot of sexual stuff. This has to be the best AI chatting app I've ever used. comes with persona's and lots of memory. I love how in one chat, a friend and I were at a bakery and it changed the subject itself, by saying we needed to head to school. sometimes it makes the moves before I do which I think is a lot less tiring. the ads aren't too bad. most bots on this app are sexual though so I usually have to make my own, but its an overall amazing app.

Incredible Ai chat box, you can create your own characters the way you want them to be, and best of all, no limited amount of chats before they lock you out until you pay for a subscription, my only issue is that they sometimes change the wallpaper of some of the chats from the original to an AI generated version which can kill the mood on some of the chats but other than that, it is a perfect app.

great experience. the AI isn't perfect but it's very responsive and engaging. it does a pretty good job of remembering details, with a few mistakes. There aren't enough ways to earn gems, and the $2 purchase option is only available once.

2026-06-04.text: I have played a lot of these type of story-based setups and I've had so many problems with the other apps sometimes it's price sometimes it's other things but I've had not one problem with this one so far I'm loving it and their prices are so reasonable they of course have an ultimate package which is a little more expensive but they have cheaper packages for those of us who can't afford the expense of one this is the best I've had yet

2026-03-30.text: I have spent hours just playing around with the variety of characters with different AI coding playing around with the trajectory of conversation and how the emotional response of the characters can go from shy and timid to Psychotic and Bipolar in a variety of timeframes that makes it fun to change the way you normally talk to a human being to basically trick your brain into thinking it's a different person all together.
